parameters.subject: =Competitor Intelligence Report: {{$node['Parse Insights'].json.competitor_name}} - {{$node['Parse Insights'].json.business_name}}
parameters.message:
=

Competitor Intelligence Report

Here is this week's competitive analysis for {{$node['Parse Insights'].json.business_name}} regarding competitor {{$node['Parse Insights'].json.competitor_name}}.

Urgency Level: {{$node['Parse Insights'].json.urgency_level.toUpperCase()}}

Key Findings

    {{$node['Parse Insights'].json.key_findings.map(f => '
  • ' + f + '
    • ').join('')}}

Threats to Watch

    {{$node['Parse Insights'].json.threats.map(t => '
  • ' + t + '
    • ').join('')}}

Opportunities

    {{$node['Parse Insights'].json.opportunities.map(o => '
  • ' + o + '
    • ').join('')}}

Recommended Actions

    {{$node['Parse Insights'].json.recommended_actions.map(a => '
  1. ' + a + '
    2. ').join('')}}

This report is generated automatically every Friday by your Maroa.ai system.

parameters.url: ={{ "https://maroa-api-production.up.railway.app/api/context/" + String($json.userId || $json.business_id || $json.user_id || $json.id || ($json.biz && $json.biz.id) || $('Loop Each Business').first().json.id || $('Loop Each Business').first().json.user_id || $('Split In Batches').first().json.id || $('Split In Batches').first().json.user_id || $vars.userId || "") }}
